Henry is about to spill the beans in his 'tell-it-like-it-was-and-is' life story - and become rich overnight.

Gus takes the moral high ground in a drive to promote family values, both on-screen and off. Meanwhile, Henry takes fright at his loss of libido and is caught short on live TV.
An adrenalized thrill ride with a high-kicking CIA agent, Vegas gangsters, mad arms dealers, nuclear terrorists, explosions, and bikini-clad beauties.

A raw sexploitation classic! Escaping her brother, Bonnie hits the streets only to be ensnared by carjackers, a predatory artist, and a twisted gallery owner with a taste for human "pets".
